events.event_description: Legation Vientiane opened, with Paul L. Guest as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, while Heath served as nonresident Minister.

evidence.quote: Note: During Heath's tenure as non-resident Minister, Legation Vientiane was opened on August 22, 1950, with Paul L. Guest as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

events.event_description: Mission elevated from Legation to Embassy when Yost was promoted from Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Charles Woodruff Yost, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1954-08-18. Credentials presented: 1954-11-01. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1955-08-19.
